one_line_ask: Vectorize and clean up HaulAway' existing raster logo to print-ready quality, then build the full set of brand variations (master vector, horizontal, stacked, icon-only AB mark, one-color knockouts, a lime-on-black trailer-wrap hero) plus a font + color-usage reference and a presentation board — all wrap/shirt/print ready.
brief:
HaulAway (junk removal & cleanout, Maitland FL / North Orlando) supplies ONE existing logo they love but only as a flat, low-resolution raster PNG (a bold "AB" monogram lockup with the company wordmark beneath, in their black / lime-green / gray palette). They need it turned into a professional, print-ready brand identity kit usable on t-shirts, vehicle & trailer wraps, car magnets, and print.

The freelancer must drive the Adobe Creative Cloud connector end-to-end:
1) Ingest the client's raster logo and get a clean working copy (auto-tone + straighten the slightly skewed scan so edges are true).
2) Clean the color: neutralize any off-cast and crisp up the lime green and the blacks so the trace is sharp.
3) Clean-knock the background to transparent so the trace has no halo.
4) Vectorize the cleaned full lockup into a clean SVG = the MASTER vector (basis for AI/EPS/SVG/PNG exports).
5) Isolate the "AB" monogram for the ICON-ONLY mark: select the wordmark text by prompt, invert to keep just the monogram, solid-fill the rest away, then vectorize the isolated mark.
6) Produce the ONE-COLOR versions: a black-on-light knockout (solid black overlay) and a white-on-dark knockout (white fil
